title: explain.request
description: Request to explain a concept, decision, or output, tailored to a specific audience and detail level.

subject.description: What should be explained (e.g., a concept, decision, or output).

context.description: Optional surrounding context or raw snippet to ground the explanation.

audience.description: Intended audience (e.g., novice, expert, legal, product-manager).

style.description: Optional style hint (e.g., step-by-step, analogy, formal).
